steps.title: Read two points
steps.content: From the graph, use $(0,3)$ and $(1,0)$. The first point gives intercept $3$.

steps.title: Find slope and intercept
steps.content:
Use the two points:
$$m=\frac{0-3}{1-0}=-3$$
With slope $-3$ and intercept $3$, the equation is $y=-3x+3$. The answer is B.
